---
title: "Create a new vendor"
description: "Create a new vendor in Baseline"
api: "POST /vendor"
---


## Request Body

<ParamField body="Name" type="string">
  Full name
</ParamField>

<ParamField body="First_Name" type="string">
  First name
</ParamField>

<ParamField body="Last_Name" type="string">
  Last name
</ParamField>

<ParamField body="Phone" type="string">
  Phone in format 12345678901
</ParamField>

<ParamField body="Phone_Secondary" type="string">
  Secondary phone number
</ParamField>

<ParamField body="Email" type="string">
  Primary email address
</ParamField>

<ParamField body="Other_Email" type="string">
  Secondary email address
</ParamField>

<ParamField body="Date_Birth" type="string">
  Date of birth
</ParamField>

<ParamField body="Is_Company" type="boolean">
  Whether this is a company
</ParamField>

<ParamField body="Address_Street1" type="string">
  Street address line 1
</ParamField>

<ParamField body="Address_Street2" type="string">
  Street address line 2
</ParamField>

<ParamField body="Address_City" type="string">
  City
</ParamField>

<ParamField body="Address_State" type="string">
  State
</ParamField>

<ParamField body="Address_Country" type="string">
  Country
</ParamField>

## Example Response

```json
{
  "vendor": {
    "Id": "1234",
    "Name": "John Smith",
    "Email": "john.smith@mailsac.com",
    "Is_Company": false
  }
}
```
